title: Invest in Nature's Growth | Treevest
hero_badge: Now open for Durian & Mango investments
hero_desc: Back verified agricultural farms by investing in individual fruit trees. Track their growth, and earn returns based on actual harvests. A tangible asset for your portfolio.
features_desc: Unlike traditional stocks, your investment grows in the soil. We connect you directly with verified farm partners.
f1_desc: Every partner farm undergoes strict KYC and site inspections before listing their crops.
f2_desc: Get regular health updates, photos, and weather reports right on your dashboard.
f3_desc: When the trees are harvested and fruits are sold, you receive your share of the profits.
footer_disclaimer: Agricultural investments carry inherent risks. Please read our risk disclosure.
